    Panel Info
    Live Preview Active

    5 Editable Sections
    Tips

    Hero Section

    Use a high-resolution image URL. Recommended size: 1200×600px for best visual impact.

    Featured Product

    Add up to 5 highlights to showcase your star product's best features.

    Social Links

    Adding all social links increases customer trust and engagement significantly.

    Publishing

    Click "Save & Publish" to make your changes live on your store immediately.

    Preview Modes

    Desktop

    Full-width layout — best for detailed content review.

    Tablet

    768px viewport — checks medium-screen responsiveness.

    Mobile

    375px viewport — most traffic comes from mobile. Always test here!
